            ArrayList<Block> blocks
            chunk coordinates in chunk grid

            0 - north, 1 - east, 2 - south, 3 - west

            Boolean[] doors

            ArrayList<Entity> entities
          • id
            int id
          • isComplete
            boolean isComplete
          • spawnPositions
